learningObjectives.title: Understand transportation optimization
learningObjectives.description: Explain optimizer-driven plan generation under business constraints and objectives.

learningObjectives.title: Understand constraints and objectives
learningObjectives.description: Identify key constraints and optimization goals affecting planning quality.

learningObjectives.title: Understand optimization outcomes
learningObjectives.description: Describe impact on cost, utilization, service levels and operational efficiency.

sections.content: Transportation Optimization is one of the most powerful capabilities of SAP Transportation Management. The optimization engine automatically generates the most efficient transportation plan by evaluating multiple constraints and objectives such as transportation cost, delivery commitments, vehicle utilization and transit time.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: The SAP TM Optimizer evaluates thousands of planning possibilities and selects the plan that best satisfies the configured optimization objectives.

A logistics company receives 600 Freight Units for deliveries across South India. Instead of creating 600 separate shipments, SAP TM's optimizer consolidates compatible Freight Units into 120 Freight Orders while respecting truck capacities, delivery schedules and transportation lanes.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Always maintain accurate master data before running the optimizer. Incorrect weights, dimensions, transportation lanes or resource capacities will produce poor optimization results.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A global FMCG company reduced annual transportation costs by 15% after implementing SAP TM Optimizer. Shipment consolidation increased truck utilization from 68% to 91%.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Certification exams often ask which objectives the optimizer considers. Remember: cost, distance, vehicle utilization, delivery deadlines and resource constraints.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: The optimizer does not ignore business constraints to reduce cost. All mandatory constraints must be satisfied before an optimized plan is generated.

items: SAP TM Optimizer automatically creates efficient transportation plans.
Optimization balances cost, service level and operational constraints.
Vehicle capacity and delivery windows are common optimization constraints.
Accurate master data is essential for optimization quality.
Transportation Optimization significantly improves logistics efficiency.
